queries.question: Give me the status of the devices that each streaming service is compatible with.
queries.sql: SELECT Devices_Compatibility.isActive  from Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility join Devices_Compatibility on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.deviceTypeId = Devices_Compatibility.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.streamingServiceId = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.deviceTypeId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.streamingServiceId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: Give me the status of the devices that each streaming service is compatible with.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.servicename , devices_compatibility.isactive from Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility join Devices_Compatibility on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.deviceTypeId = Devices_Compatibility.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.streamingServiceId = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?servicename ?isactive WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_devices_compatibility a :Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility .
  ?devices_compatibility a :Devices_Compatibility .
  ?streaming_service_devices_compatibility p:hasDevices_Compatibility ?devices_compatibility .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_devices_compatibility p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:serviceName ?servicename .
  ?devices_compatibility p:isActive ?isactive .
}

queries.question: Give me the names and statuses of the compatible devices each streaming service has.
queries.sql: SELECT Devices_Compatibility.deviceName, Devices_Compatibility.isActive  from Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility join Devices_Compatibility on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.deviceTypeId = Devices_Compatibility.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.streamingServiceId = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.deviceTypeId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.streamingServiceId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: Give me the names and statuses of the compatible devices each streaming service has.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.servicename , devices_compatibility.devicename , devices_compatibility.isactive from Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility join Devices_Compatibility on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.deviceTypeId = Devices_Compatibility.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.streamingServiceId = Streaming_Services.id

SELECT ?servicename ?devicename ?isactive WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_devices_compatibility a :Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility .
  ?devices_compatibility a :Devices_Compatibility .

  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_devices_compatibility p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:serviceName ?servicename .
  ?devices_compatibility p:deviceName ?devicename .

queries.question: Give me the devices we have for every streaming service
queries.sql: SELECT Devices_Compatibility.deviceName  from Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility join Devices_Compatibility on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.deviceTypeId = Devices_Compatibility.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.streamingServiceId = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.deviceTypeId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.streamingServiceId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: Give me the devices we have for every streaming service
queries.sql: select streaming_services.servicename , devices_compatibility.devicename from Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility join Devices_Compatibility on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.deviceTypeId = Devices_Compatibility.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility.streamingServiceId = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?servicename ?devicename WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_devices_compatibility a :Streaming_Service_Devices_Compatibility .
  ?devices_compatibility a :Devices_Compatibility .
  ?streaming_service_devices_compatibility p:hasDevices_Compatibility ?devices_compatibility .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_devices_compatibility p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:serviceName ?servicename .
  ?devices_compatibility p:deviceName ?devicename .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the names and statuses of the compatible devices each streaming service has.
Give me the status of the devices that each streaming service is compatible with.
Give me the devices we have for every streaming service
